name: TriPartum
message: TriPartum specializes in creating clear and engaging customer communications for sectors such as finance, insurance, utilities, telecommunications, retail, and housing providers. They focus on customer communication management and experience, delivering solutions that optimize personalized critical mailings.We will upload almost 70gb of corporate data soon. Employee information (passports, DLs and other personal information, credit cards), financials, customers information, projects, NDAs, etc.
